name: jetscope
description: Sustainable Aviation Fuel market intelligence: real-time price benchmarking, carbon cost analysis, and procurement decision support

scripts.dev: echo '[DEPRECATED] root jetscope copy is mirror-only; develop in ~/projects/jetscope (see /Users/yumei/NOTICE.md)' >&2 && concurrently "npm run api:dev" "npm run web:dev"
scripts.release: echo '[DEPRECATED] root jetscope copy is mirror-only; release from ~/projects/jetscope (see /Users/yumei/NOTICE.md)' >&2 && bash ./scripts/release.sh
scripts.web:dev: echo '[DEPRECATED] root jetscope copy is mirror-only; develop in ~/projects/jetscope' >&2 && npm --prefix apps/web run dev
scripts.web:build: echo '[DEPRECATED] root jetscope copy is mirror-only; build in ~/projects/jetscope' >&2 && npm --prefix apps/web run build
scripts.web:start: echo '[DEPRECATED] root jetscope copy is mirror-only; run from ~/projects/jetscope' >&2 && npm --prefix apps/web run start
scripts.web:lint: echo '[DEPRECATED] root jetscope copy is mirror-only; lint in ~/projects/jetscope' >&2 && npm --prefix apps/web run lint
scripts.web:typecheck: echo '[DEPRECATED] root jetscope copy is mirror-only; typecheck in ~/projects/jetscope' >&2 && npm --prefix apps/web run typecheck
scripts.web:gate: echo '[DEPRECATED] root jetscope copy is mirror-only; run web:gate in ~/projects/jetscope' >&2 && npm --prefix apps/web run gate
scripts.api:dev: echo '[DEPRECATED] root jetscope copy is mirror-only; develop in ~/projects/jetscope' >&2 && cd apps/api && .venv/bin/uvicorn app.main:app --reload --port 8000
scripts.api:check: echo '[DEPRECATED] root jetscope copy is mirror-only; api:check from ~/projects/jetscope' >&2 && node scripts/api-check.mjs
scripts.api:test: echo '[DEPRECATED] root jetscope copy is mirror-only; api:test from ~/projects/jetscope' >&2 && cd apps/api && .venv/bin/python -m pytest tests
scripts.api:openapi: echo '[DEPRECATED] root jetscope copy is mirror-only; api:openapi from ~/projects/jetscope' >&2 && cd apps/api && .venv/bin/python generate_openapi.py
scripts.api:openapi:check: echo '[DEPRECATED] root jetscope copy is mirror-only; api:openapi:check from ~/projects/jetscope' >&2 && node scripts/openapi-check.mjs
scripts.api:full-check: echo '[DEPRECATED] root jetscope copy is mirror-only; api:full-check from ~/projects/jetscope' >&2 && node scripts/api-check.mjs
scripts.api:migrate: echo '[DEPRECATED] root jetscope copy is mirror-only; migrate from ~/projects/jetscope' >&2 && cd apps/api && alembic upgrade head
scripts.test: echo '[DEPRECATED] root jetscope copy is mirror-only; run tests from ~/projects/jetscope' >&2 && node --experimental-strip-types --test test/admin-validation.test.mjs test/automation-plan-check.test.mjs test/automation-scope-check.test.mjs test/preflight-ui-e2e-contract.test.mjs test/release-approval-contract.test.mjs test/product-read-model.test.mjs test/sources-read-model.test.mjs test/portfolio-read-model.test.mjs test/routing.test.mjs test/tipping-point-workbench-contract.test.mjs test/proxy-route-contract.test.mjs packages/core/industry/__tests__/*.test.mjs
scripts.sync:check: echo '[DEPRECATED] root jetscope copy is mirror-only; sync:check from ~/projects/jetscope' >&2 && bash ./scripts/sync-check.sh
scripts.preflight: echo '[DEPRECATED] root jetscope copy is mirror-only; preflight from ~/projects/jetscope' >&2 && npm run web:gate && npm run api:check && npm run api:test && npm run api:openapi:check && npm test && npm run preflight:product && npm run preflight:e2e
scripts.preflight:product: echo '[DEPRECATED] root jetscope copy is mirror-only; preflight:product from ~/projects/jetscope' >&2 && node scripts/preflight-product-smoke.mjs
scripts.preflight:e2e: echo '[DEPRECATED] root jetscope copy is mirror-only; preflight:e2e from ~/projects/jetscope' >&2 && node scripts/preflight-ui-e2e.mjs
scripts.docker:up: echo '[DEPRECATED] root jetscope copy is mirror-only; docker:up from ~/projects/jetscope' >&2 && cd infra && docker-compose up -d
scripts.docker:down: echo '[DEPRECATED] root jetscope copy is mirror-only; docker:down from ~/projects/jetscope' >&2 && cd infra && docker-compose down
scripts.audit:security: echo '[DEPRECATED] root jetscope copy is mirror-only; audit from ~/projects/jetscope' >&2 && npm audit --audit-level=high
scripts.audit:python: echo '[DEPRECATED] root jetscope copy is mirror-only; audit:python from ~/projects/jetscope' >&2 && cd apps/api && if command -v python >/dev/null 2>&1 && python -c 'import pip_audit' 2>/dev/null; then python -m pip_audit -r requirements.txt; elif [ -x .venv/bin/python ] && .venv/bin/python -c 'import pip_audit' 2>/dev/null; then .venv/bin/python -m pip_audit -r requirements.txt; else python3 -m pip_audit -r requirements.txt; fi
